title: Log in and access authenticated dashboard
description: Verifies a returning user can log in from the auth page and is taken to the authenticated dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Complete a habit and see streak/score update on habits page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can mark a habit complete and the UI reflects the updated habit state and streak/score impact.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to habits
Mark the first available active habit as complete
Verify the habit is shown as completed
Verify the habit streak or today's score reflects the completion

title: Unauthenticated user is gated from the shop
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user cannot access the shop and is redirected to the authentication page.

steps.description: Verify the authentication page is displayed

title: Complete habit then verify dashboard updates after returning
description: Verifies a user can complete a habit on the habits page and, after returning to the dashboard, sees today’s score or streak visualizations reflect the completion.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to habits
Mark the first available active habit as complete
Click the navigation link to dashboard
Verify today's score or streak visualizations reflect the habit completion

title: Unauthenticated user is gated from the leaderboard
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user cannot access the leaderboard and is redirected to the authentication page.

steps.description: Verify the authentication page is displayed

title: Redeem a reward and see Aura Points balance update
description: Verifies a logged-in user can redeem a reward from the shop and their Aura Points balance updates after confirming redemption.

steps.description: Click the link to open the shop
Verify the Aura Points balance displayed in the shop decreases after redemption

title: Dashboard daily overview renders key sections
description: Verifies an authenticated user can view today’s score/rank, core stat cards, charts, and today’s permanent tasks on the dashboard.

steps.description: Scroll to today's permanent tasks section
Verify today's score and rank summary is displayed
Verify dashboard charts and today's tasks are displayed

title: Sign up and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can create an account via signup and is taken to the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Block redemption when the user has insufficient Aura Points
description: Verifies the shop prevents redeeming a reward that costs more than the user's available Aura Points and shows an insufficient-points validation message.

steps.description: Click the link to open the shop
Capture the current Aura Points balance displayed in the shop
Attempt to redeem a reward that costs more Aura Points than available
Verify an insufficient-points validation message is visible
Verify the Aura Points balance displayed in the shop is unchanged

title: Open task detail overlay from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open a task detail overlay from today’s tasks and see metadata including score contribution and streak information.

steps.description: Scroll to today's permanent tasks section
Click a task to open its details
Verify a task detail overlay is visible
Verify the overlay shows score contribution and streak metadata

title: Aura Points balance stays consistent after redemption when navigating away and back
description: Verifies the updated Aura Points balance after a successful redemption remains consistent when navigating to another page and returning to the shop.

steps.description: Click the link to open the shop
Click the link to open the leaderboard
Click the link to open the shop
Verify the Aura Points balance displayed in the shop reflects the redemption

title: View leaderboard overview including podium and self rank card
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open the leaderboard and see the podium and their self rank card with Aura Points.

steps.description: Click the link to open the leaderboard
Verify the top three podium is displayed
Verify the self rank card is displayed with total Aura Points

title: Open Aura history timeline and view day-by-day entries
description: Verifies a logged-in user can open the Aura history timeline from the leaderboard and see day-by-day earned and lost points entries.

steps.description: Click the link to open the leaderboard
Verify the Aura history timeline is displayed with day-by-day entries

title: Browse rewards list in the shop
description: Verifies a logged-in user can view the available rewards list in the shop without initiating redemption.

steps.description: Click the link to open the shop
Verify a list of rewards is displayed

title: Inspect weekly Aura summary and streak multiplier progress
description: Verifies a logged-in user can view weekly Aura summary information and streak multiplier progress on the leaderboard page.

steps.description: Click the link to open the leaderboard
Verify the weekly Aura summary is displayed
Verify streak multiplier progress is displayed

title: Aura Points shown on self rank card stays consistent across navigation
description: Verifies the Aura Points value shown on the leaderboard self rank card remains consistent after navigating away and returning.

steps.description: Click the link to open the leaderboard
Capture the Aura Points value displayed on the self rank card
Click the link to open the shop
Click the link to open the leaderboard
Verify the Aura Points value displayed on the self rank card matches the previously captured value

title: Show validation errors for invalid signup credentials
description: Verifies signup blocks invalid credentials and shows validation feedback without authenticating the user.

steps.description: Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a too-short password into the password field

title: Cancel a reward redemption from the confirmation prompt
description: Verifies a logged-in user can cancel a redemption confirmation and no Aura Points are deducted.

steps.description: Click the link to open the shop
Capture the current Aura Points balance displayed in the shop
Verify the Aura Points balance displayed in the shop is unchanged

title: Habit completion requires required numeric input
description: Verifies attempting to complete a habit that requires a numeric value shows validation feedback when the input is missing.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to habits
Attempt to mark a habit complete without providing a required numeric value
Verify validation feedback for the habit input is visible

title: Review the penalty log on the leaderboard
description: Verifies a logged-in user can view the penalty log section on the leaderboard page.

steps.description: Click the link to open the leaderboard
Verify the penalty log is displayed
